name: agent-booster-pack-specify
description: Manual ABP Pi Specify workflow plus specify skill: Design-partner mode, one decision question at a time.

scripts.install-ext: npm run build && mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/extensions && ln -sfn "$(pwd)" ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-specify && echo 'Installed to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-specify -- run /reload in Pi to activate'

author: Alastair Dawson
